name: Furion S601 Profile
comment: Furion S601 Profile is a moving head with high output and great effects. It is designed to produce a collimated beam with virtually no divergence in your custom created shapes. The 7:1 zoom ratio from 6,5deg to 45deg, the 2 rotating gobo wheels with a total of 11 glass gobos plus auto focus guarantee well-defined, crystal clear projections and the morphing possibilities leave nothing to be desired. Choosing the right colour is easy because of the CMY + CTO module in combination with the separate color wheel. All these features and more, like Digital Motion FX and the continuous bi-rotating animation-wheel offer the light designer endless possibilities to put his imagination to work and create the most dynamic and awesome light show ever.

capabilities.comment: Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random

capabilities.effectName: Slow Zoom Out/Fast Zoom In S > F - Macro
